name: hermes-mcp-shared-deps
description: Not a runnable MCP server — just the shared Node.js runtime dependencies for every MCP server template under src/hermes/mcp/<name>/. Baked into the Hermes image at /opt/node_modules by Dockerfile.hermes. Each room's seeded MCP source (server.mjs) is ESM and resolves these via directory-walk-up node_modules lookup, since ESM ignores NODE_PATH. Keep in sync with the union of every MCP template's own package.json dependencies.
